testcase.name: runScenario["Correct Username & Password for login and Successful Withdrawal", "Milli Piyango Withdrawal Check Test Cases"](1)

failure.message: Username or password not set. Please provide them using -Dusername and -Dpassword.

testcase.failure: java.lang.RuntimeException: Username or password not set. Please provide them using -Dusername and -Dpassword. at util.Hooks.beforeSkipLogin(Hooks.java:36)
testcase.system-out: @MilliPiyangoWithdrawal @SuccessfulWithdrawals @SkipLogin Scenario Outline: Correct Username & Password for login and Successful Withdrawal &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/Features/Withdrawal.feature:14&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[31mjava.lang.RuntimeException: Username or password not set. testcase.system-err: Oct 24, 2024 10:37:57 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 130 Oct 24, 2024 10:37:57 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 130.0.6723.60. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.14.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's. Oct 24, 2024 10:37:58 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 130 Oct 24, 2024 10:37:58 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 130.0.6723.60. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.14.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
